articles.description: The BJP’s candidate from Bhabanipur is the Leader of the Opposition in the West Bengal Assembly Suvendu Adhikari, who claims, ‘She and her party both will lose this time’

articles.title: Edappadi K. Palaniswami, the lone star of AIADMK election campaign, steps up his pitch for power
articles.description: The former Chief Minister is the main campaigner for the AIADMK across Tamil Nadu, with a stump speech focused on law and order issues, the State’s finances, concerns of government employees, drug menace, and rising inflation; he also highlights features of the manifesto of his party

articles.title: A self-driving car in Austin killed a mother duck, sparking neighborhood outrage
articles.description: This incident has brought negative attention to the new technology.

topStories.title: ‘Shut down the business’: US company faces backlash over ‘earth usage fee’ on online orders
topStories.description: Outdoor brand Patagonia is facing online backlash after introducing an “earth usage fee” on orders in China. While the company says the move aims to reduce carbon emissions from high return rates, many users have slammed it as shifting responsibility onto customers.

topStories.title: JD Vance to lead US delegation to Pakistan for direct talks with Iran amid fragile ceasefire
topStories.description: “President Trump is dispatching his negotiating team led by the vice president of the United States, JD Vance, special envoy Steve Witkoff, and Jared Kushner to Islamabad for talks this weekend,” Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said.

topStories.title: Choose Truce Or "Continue War Via Israel": Iran Warns US Over Lebanon Attacks
topStories.description: White House has dismissed the inclusion of Lebanon in the temporary ceasefire agreement, backing Israel's continued military operation against Hezbollah.

topStories.title: Election Commission-Trinamool Congress meeting ends on an acrimonious note
topStories.description: Trinamool delegation says Chief Election Commissioner told them to ‘get lost’, poll body sources say the Commission asked Rajya Sabha Member Derek O’Brien not to shout and ‘maintain decorum’

topStories.title: World reacts to ‘brutal’ Israeli attacks on Lebanon amid US-Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: Israeli attacks have killed at least 254 people and wounded 1,165 others, according to Lebanon’s Civil Defence.

topStories.title: Dragon does a Trump 'China made efforts to stop war'
topStories.description: China has stated it made "own efforts" to push for a ceasefire between the US and Iran, following reports of its pivotal role in brokering a two-week pause in hostilities. Foreign ministry spokeswoman Mao Ning detailed Beijing's diplomatic engagements aimed at deescalating regional tensions and achieving long-term stability.

topStories.title: Fed minutes show growing openness to rate hikes at March meeting
topStories.description: In recent meetings, Federal Reserve officials mulled the idea of increasing interest rates as inflation rates climbed beyond target thresholds, influenced in part by the intensifying U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran. Despite this, there is a strong expectation among many for rate cuts on the horizon.

topStories.title: Iran Accuses US Of Violating Key Clauses Of Peace Framework Before Talks
topStories.description: A fresh diplomatic row has erupted after Iranian officials accused the United States of violating three clauses of the 10-Point Proposal, the agreed framework for upcoming negotiations.

topStories.title: White House says Trump’s ‘red line’ against Iran nuclear enrichment remains
topStories.description: Trump's spokesperson says Vice President JD Vance will lead US team for negotiations with Iran in Pakistan on Saturday.

topStories.title: 'Ketamine Queen' Jailed For 15 Years For Selling Drugs To Matthew Perry
topStories.description: Jasveen Sangha, 42, was one of five people charged over the death of the beloved Canadian-American actor.

topStories.title: Inside 15-Minute Meet Between Trinamool Congress And Poll Body Chief
topStories.description: The meeting lasted roughly 15 minutes but has resulted in a significant political controversy with sharply differing accounts from both sides.

topStories.title: JD Vance slams Zelenskyy’s comments about Hungary’s Orban
topStories.description: US vice president in Hungary calls Ukrainian leader's 'threatening' remarks 'completely scandalous'.

dailyNews.description: The world counts down to Trump’s threats of destruction.

dailyNews.title: White House demands Iran reopen Strait of Hormuz immediately after closure claims
dailyNews.description: According to the White House, President Donald Trump expects the strait to remain open, and stressed that Tehran will be held accountable if it fails to ensure continued access for international shipping.

dailyNews.title: ‘A lot of work to do’ to reopen Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said more work is needed to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Israel carries out large wave of air strikes across Lebanon
dailyNews.description: Attacks hit the southern suburbs of Beirut, southern Lebanon and the eastern Bekaa Valley hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Lebanon not part of US-Iran ceasefire, but ‘will get taken care of’ - Report
dailyNews.description: The comments come after Israel continued its strikes against Hezbollah in Lebanon, even a day after the United States and Iran agreed to a two‑week ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: Academicians appeal to President to intervene in Supreme Court textbook row
dailyNews.description: By forcefully intervening in what is essentially an educational matter, threatening criminal contempt of court and banishing respected educationists without hearing them, the Supreme Court, had encroached upon academic freedom, the letter says

dailyNews.title: Pam Bondi won’t testify to House committee investigating Jeffrey Epstein next week, says Justice Department
dailyNews.description: The House Oversight Committee had subpoenaed Bondi on 17 March to testify as part of an investigation into the DOJ's handling of the Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell cases. Donald Trump fired Bondi as the US Attorney General Pam on April 2, after just over a year in office.

dailyNews.title: Iran Strait of Hormuz warning adds to shipping uncertainty
dailyNews.description: Only a few vessels have crossed the strait since the US-Iran ceasefire deal, according to BBC Verify analysis.

dailyNews.title: Volkswagen begins testing its self-driving microbuses in Los Angeles ahead of launch with Uber
dailyNews.description: Volkswagen subsidiary MOIA America still has a long and winding regulatory road before it can launch a commercial robotaxi service.

dailyNews.title: Trump claims victory in Iran — but is this really a win?
dailyNews.description: Before a single term has been negotiated, Trump is claiming total victory over Iran, but is this really a win?

dailyNews.title: Donald Trump says only one set of terms acceptable in US-Iran talks: ‘These are the POINTS…’
dailyNews.description: In his latest post on TRUTH Social, Trump said, “There is only one group of meaningful ‘POINTS’ that are acceptable to the United States…”

dailyNews.title: Vogue’s Anna Wintour takes swipe at Melania Trump’s style while praising liberal favorites
dailyNews.description: Former Vogue editor-in-chief Anna Wintour remarked how first lady Melania Trump always "looks like herself" in a new interview for her magazine on Tuesday.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin scores Minnesota court win in Medicaid fraud crackdown
dailyNews.description: Minnesota's bid to block the Trump administration from withholding over $259 million in Medicaid funds failed after a federal judge called the state's legal challenge premature.

dailyNews.title: Trump critics go from outrage over Iran threat to mocking him as 'chicken' for not following through
dailyNews.description: Critics slammed President Donald Trump's Iran threat as potential genocide, then mocked him for not following through, using the viral TACO acronym.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Trump’s push to deport Abrego Garcia, rebukes DOJ for trying to ‘dictate’ court
dailyNews.description: A U.S. judge blocked Abrego Garcia's removal to Liberia, for now, further delaying a 13-month case that has spanned two continents and multiple federal court districts.

dailyNews.title: Stormy Daniels’ disgraced ex-lawyer and anti-Trump superstar Michael Avenatti moved to halfway house
dailyNews.description: Michael Avenatti has been moved from federal prison to a residential reentry program in California, per Bureau of Prisons records. He remains in custody.

dailyNews.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz is closed due to Israeli strikes on Lebanon
dailyNews.description: Reports from Iranian state media say the Strait of Hormuz is not open because Iran is responding to the continued Israeli airstrikes into Lebanon. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said Lebanon is not part of the ceasefire agreement that has been brokered. NBC News’ Monica Alba details where the Trump administration stands and what’s next for peace talks.

dailyNews.title: Oil plunges on Iran ceasefire news, setting the stage for some relief on gas prices
dailyNews.description: Stocks roared higher after President Trump announced a two-week ceasefire with Iran. Oil prices fell sharply and gas prices are expected to follow.

dailyNews.title: Trump 'discarded' Iran's original 10-point plan
dailyNews.description: Trump 'discarded' Iran's original 10-point plan

dailyNews.title: Hegseth says Trump chose 'mercy' in dealing with Iran
dailyNews.description: Hegseth says Trump chose 'mercy' in dealing with Iran

dailyNews.title: Dow surges more than 1,300 points as investors embrace Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Investors cheered the announcement of a two-week ceasefire, which President Trump said is contingent on the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Iran accuses U.S. of violating ceasefire amid Israeli attacks on Lebanon
dailyNews.description: Iran says Israel is violating the ceasefire deal President Trump announced, and Tehran appears to still have control over shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Leavitt takes questions on Iran ceasefire, says Vance will lead negotiating team in Pakistan
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt took questions Wednesday about the ceasefire agreement between the U.S. and Iran, shedding light on negotiations  between the two countries that will take place this weekend in Islamabad, Pakistan. Following the briefing, CBS News' Ed O'Keefe provided more insight.
